---
title: 'About this Wiki'
---

# About us

[![MKReyesH](https://github.com/MKReyesH.png?size=40) MKReyesH](https://github.com/MKReyesH)

# Powered By

- [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/): Hosting and deployment infrastructure.
- [Quarto](https://quarto.org/): Markdown rendering, cross-referencing, and website generation.
- [Pandoc](https://pandoc.org/): Document format translation.
- [Bootstrap](https://getbootstrap.com/) and [Bootswatch](https://bootswatch.com/): CSS support and user interface.
- [MathJax](https://www.mathjax.org/): Mathematical notation rendering.
- [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app): Lua filter generation assistance.

# Contributing

If you would like to contribute to the core template, add new LaTeX translation rules, or fix a bug, do not hesitate to open a Pull Request at the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/MKReyesH/ScientificWiki).
